CreateSecurityGroup.desc: Create a security group with optional rules
CreateSecurityGroup.name: Security group name, 1-65 characters, must start with a letter
CreateSecurityGroup.vpcId: VPC ID the security group belongs to
CreateSecurityGroup.rules: List of security group rules to bind on creation
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.sourceIp: Inbound source IP or CIDR (mutually exclusive with sourceGroupId)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.sourceGroupId: Inbound source security group ID (mutually exclusive with sourceIp)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.destIp: Outbound destination IP or CIDR (mutually exclusive with destGroupId)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.destGroupId: Outbound destination security group ID (mutually exclusive with destIp)
CreateSecurityGroup.tags: List of tags to bind on creation

DescribeSecurityGroups.instanceId: Cloud instance ID to filter associated security groups
DescribeSecurityGroups.securityGroupId: Specific security group ID to query
DescribeSecurityGroups.securityGroupIds: Comma-separated list of security group IDs to query

DescribeSecurityGroup.desc: Get detailed information about a security group

DeleteSecurityGroup.securityGroupId: ID of the security group to delete

AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.desc: Add a new rule to a security group
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule: Security group rule object to authorize
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.sourceIp: Inbound source IP or CIDR (mutually exclusive with sourceGroupId)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.sourceGroupId: Inbound source security group ID (mutually exclusive with sourceIp)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.destIp: Outbound destination IP or CIDR (mutually exclusive with destGroupId)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.destGroupId: Outbound destination security group ID (mutually exclusive with destIp)

RevokeSecurityGroupRule.desc: Remove a rule from a security group
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule: Security group rule object to revoke
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.sourceIp: Inbound source IP or CIDR (mutually exclusive with sourceGroupId)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.sourceGroupId: Inbound source security group ID (mutually exclusive with sourceIp)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.destIp: Outbound destination IP or CIDR (mutually exclusive with destGroupId)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.destGroupId: Outbound destination security group ID (mutually exclusive with destIp)

UpdateSecurityGroupRule.sourceIp: Inbound source IP (mutually exclusive with sourceGroupId)
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.sourceGroupId: Inbound source security group ID (mutually exclusive with sourceIp)
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.destIp: Outbound destination IP (mutually exclusive with destGroupId)
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.destGroupId: Outbound destination security group ID (mutually exclusive with destIp)
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.protocol: Protocol (tcp/udp to icmp conversion not supported)

DeleteSecurityGroupRule.securityGroupRuleId: ID of the security group rule to delete
